question: Which Muslim scholar was born first, Kamāl al-Dīn al-Fārisī or M. A. Muqtedar Khan? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
answer: Kamal al-Din Hasan ibn Ali ibn Hasan al-Farisi

1.fact: Kamāl al-Dīn al-Fārisī: Kamal al-Din Hasan ibn Ali ibn Hasan al-Farisi or Abu Hasan Muhammad ibn Hasan (1267-12 January 1319, long assumed to be 1320) was a prominent Persian Muslim scientist.
1.subquestion: When was Kamāl al-Dīn al-Fārisī born?

2.fact: M. A. Muqtedar Khan: M. A. Muqtedar Khan (Muhammad Abdul Muqtedar Khan), born 1966, is a professor in the Department of Political Science and International Relations at the University of Delaware. Khan is the founding director of the Islamic Studies Program at the university. He earned his Ph.D. in international relations, political philosophy and Islamic political thought from Georgetown University in May 2000.
2.subquestion: When was M. A. Muqtedar Khan born?

reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Kamāl al-Dīn al-Fārisī was born in 1267, while M. A. Muqtedar Khan was born in 1966, so Kamal al-Din Hasan ibn Ali ibn Hasan al-Farisi was born first. -> Kamal al-Din Hasan ibn Ali ibn Hasan al-Farisi
Final answer: Kamal al-Din Hasan ibn Ali ibn Hasan al-Farisi
